query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN contractors IS NOT NULL AND contractors != '[]' AND contractors != 'null' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_contractors, SUM(CASE WHEN owner IS NOT NULL AND owner != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_owner FROM projects;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN contractors IS NOT NULL AND contractors != '[]' AND contractors != 'null' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_contractors, SUM(CASE WHEN owner IS NOT NULL AND owner != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_owner FROM projects;
